title: Language Change - Houston Screen - Cancel
scenario: User is returned to home screen after cancelling firmware update failure screen triggered by language change
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with a Poly Bluetooth audio device connected.
Navigate to Account → Language and change the language to a different supported language.
Observe that a firmware update is triggered as a result of the language change.
When the firmware update failure screen (Houston screen) appears, tap the Cancel or Dismiss button.
Observe the screen displayed after cancellation.
expected: The user is returned to the Home screen showing the currently connected device.
